title: Equipment and Supplies Management: Instructional Materials Care and Accounting
description: Conroe ISD outlines how instructional materials — such as textbooks and other learning resources — are distributed, cared for, and tracked throughout the school year. Students and families are responsible for keeping these materials in good condition, and damage or loss may result in fees. Proper management of these resources helps ensure that materials remain available for all students and that district funds are used responsibly.
